nasb.text: No one of illegitimate birth shall enter the assembly of the Lord; none of his descendants, even to the tenth generation, shall enter the assembly of the Lord.

esv.text: “No one born of a forbidden union may enter the assembly of the Lord. Even to the tenth generation, none of his descendants may enter the assembly of the Lord.

cnv.text: 私生子不可進耶和華的會；他的後代直到第十代，也不可進耶和華的會。

ccb.text: “私生子及其十代以内的子孙都不可加入耶和华的会众。
